scene: A doodle stick figure striding through a door frame with one finger raised like it is on a mission, but a big question mark pops over its head the instant it crosses. Flat warm yellow background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

In one room a glowing lightbulb idea is being sealed shut inside a cardboard box, right as a doodle stick figure steps through a door frame into the next room. Flat teal background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A doodle stick figure standing blankly in an empty room scratching its head, with a totally empty thought bubble, an open doorway behind it. Flat dusty blue background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A friendly cartoon doorway gently sliding a labeled file folder shut into a filing cabinet drawer, a tiny boxed-up glowing thought tucked inside. Flat coral pink background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
